# CiWorkflowUpdateRequest.Data.Relationships.MacOsVersion

**Object**

The relationship to the macOS Versions resource you can set with the request that updates a Workflows resource.

## Declaration

```swift
object CiWorkflowUpdateRequest.Data.Relationships.MacOsVersion
```

## Objects

- **CiWorkflowUpdateRequest.Data.Relationships.MacOsVersion.Data**: The type and ID of the macOS Versions resource that you’re relating with the Workflows resource you’re updating.

## Objects

- **CiWorkflowUpdateRequest.Data.Relationships.XcodeVersion**: The relationship to the Xcode Versions resource you can set with the request that updates a Workflows resource.
